section.p: Since 2023, I simplified the building and deployment of this web site.

subsection.title: The Static Web Site Server
subsection.p: I stopped hosting this site on my own Linux virtual machine, and instead used Azure Static Web App, a free alternative.

subsection.title: It Goes to 11: From Hugo to 11ty
subsection.p: This site is now fully generated by 11ty, within a GitHub Action that both builds and deploys the site each time a change is pushed to my Git repository's main branch.

subsection.title: Oat and AI
subsection.p: With some assistance from GitHub Copilot, I replaced this site's CSS using Bootstrap with Oat.
